channel.title: SevenAtSevenSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SevenAtSevenSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: How do Olympians like Eileen Gu earn $23 million? Here are all the ways
item.description: Most Olympians never win big money — or big fame. So how are athletes such as Eileen Gu or Chloe Kim able to earn millions of dollars? Here are some o...

item.title: How a recent shift in DNA sleuthing might help investigators in the Nancy Guthrie case
item.description: DNA science has helped solve criminal cases for decades. But increasingly, investigative genetic genealogy — which was first used for cold cases — is ...

item.title: Epstein once attended an elite arts camp. Years later, he used it to find his victims
item.description: Jeffrey Epstein and Ghislaine Maxwell lavished money on the Interlochen Center for the Arts to gain access, documents show — even funding an on-campus...

item.title: Urban sketchers find the sublime in the city block
item.description: Sketchers say making art together in urban environments allows them to create a record of a moment and to notice a little bit more about the city they...

item.title: An unsung hero stepped in to help a newly widowed mom in a moment of need
item.description: Barbara Alvarez lost her husband in 2017, just before their daughter went off to college. Her unsung hero helped her find the strength to be a single ...

item.title: OpenAI deepens India push with Pine Labs fintech partnership
item.description: OpenAI moves beyond ChatGPT in India with a Pine Labs deal targeting enterprise payments and AI-driven commerce.

item.title: Snow drought helped set the stage for deadly California avalanche, leading to unstable conditions
OpenAI taps Tata for 100MW AI data center capacity in India, eyes 1GW
item.description: OpenAI also plans to expand its presence in India with new offices in Mumbai and Bengaluru later this year.

item.title: Skiers with roots in Lake Tahoe’s alpine community among 8 killed in California avalanche
item.description: Authorities say the bodies of eight backcountry skiers have been found and one remains missing after an avalanche near Lake Tahoe in California.

item.title: Single-Family vs. Multifamily Rentals: Which Is the Best First Rental?
item.description: Single-family vs. multifamily rental properties—which gets you to financial freedom faster? A rookie real estate investor is wondering what he should ...

item.title: How the Wealthiest Have Programmed Their Portfolios This Year
item.description: Despite stock markets hovering around record highs, investors are feeling jittery. You can see it in consumer confidence collapsing to its lowest leve...

item.title: Is your startup’s check engine light on? Google Cloud’s VP explains what to do
item.description: Startup founders are being pushed to move faster than ever, using AI while facing tighter funding, rising infrastructure costs, and more pressure to s...

item.title: How to Buy Your First (or Next) Rental Property in 2026 (Step by Step)
item.description: Want to buy your first rental property in 2026? You’ve come to the right place! Whether you dream of becoming a “small and mighty” investor or buildin...

item.title: The Housing For the 21st Century Act Brings Game Changers For Multifamily Investors
item.description: There’s nothing that unifies opposing political factions faster than seeing homeless encampments in American cities. That’s why the Housing for the 21...

item.title: Hacking conference Def Con bans three people linked to Epstein
item.description: The Def Con hacking conference banned hackers Pablos Holman and Vincenzo Iozzo, as well as former MIT Media Lab director Joichi Ito, from attending th...

item.title: The backcountry ski trip hit by avalanche was led by an outfit offering mountain adventures globally
Etsy sells secondhand clothing marketplace Depop to eBay for $1.2B
item.description: The deal comes nearly five years after Etsy purchased Depop for $1.62 billion, at a time when secondhand clothing apps were gaining traction during th...

item.title: How to Buy Five Short-Term Rentals in Five Years
item.description: Everyone hears “five Airbnbs in five years” and immediately pictures some kind of motivational speaker montage. You know the one: And then year two hi...
